title: Distillation and Refinement of Reasoning in Small Language Models for Document Re-ranking

defines.name: reasoning-intensive document ranking framework
defines.definition: A framework that distills and refines explicit reasoning capabilities in small language models for document re-ranking using synthetic supervision and reinforcement learning.

problem: Existing reranking models struggle with reasoning-intensive queries and small models lack the reasoning ability of much larger language models, while manual annotations are expensive.
